takes.southern route of the strait of hormuz b: Partial Hormuz blockage escalates risk, supporting higher oil prices.
takes.trump says ceasefire is over after us an: Ceasefire collapse and strikes escalate tensions, driving prices higher.
takes.trump calls ceasefire into question as i: Renewed US-Iran conflict undermines ceasefire, adding upward pressure to prices.
takes.iran defiant after us strikes no safe sh: Iran's defiance and threats heighten risk, supporting a war premium on oil.
takes.indian stocks rupee slide after trump re: Trump's rhetoric escalates risk perception, pushing oil prices higher.
